description: Layer-2 keyring: collection of SignerEntry records owned by an organization. Composes with v8.4.0 OrgIdentity (Layer 1) and v8.5.0 SignerCompetenceRule (Layer 3) to form the three-layer authority cascade. Cross-field validation enforces signer_id uniqueness within signers[] (KR-1) and warns on duplicate key_ref entries (KR-2 — duplicate references to the same underlying key are typically a misconfiguration).

keyring_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for this keyring (UUID v4).

org_id.description: Foreign key to OrgIdentity.org_id — the constitutional principal owning this keyring.

signers.description: At least one signer must be enrolled. Empty keyrings are not meaningful.

items.description: Cryptographic-material entry inside a Keyring. Binds signer_id + key_ref to a public key, signature kind, scoped trust profile, and lifecycle status.

signer_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for the signer within its keyring. Lowercase, hyphens / underscores; 3-64 chars.

key_ref.description: Consumer-side reference for the underlying secret material (HSM slot, KMS handle, file path, etc.). Hounfour never sees the secret.

public_key.description: Ed25519 public key, unpadded base64url-encoded (RFC 4648 §5), prefixed with "ed25519-pub:". A 32-byte Ed25519 key encodes to exactly 43 unpadded characters; padded forms with "=" are NOT accepted (the character class excludes padding) — producers MUST emit unpadded base64url.

signature_type.description: Semantic kind of a signature: what the signer is asserting by signing. Orthogonal to the crypto algorithm.

anyOf.description: Signer is asserting a fact they observed or vouch for.
Signer is granting permission for a downstream action.
Signer is binding themselves to a future action or state.
Dev-only marker. NOT a cryptographic guarantee — consumers MUST reject in production.

scoped_trust.description: Per-capability-scope trust levels with default fallback (v6.0.0; v8.5.0 EXTEND adds optional match_strategy + precedence_score per D-007 / OQ-S6).

scopes.description: Per-scope trust levels. Missing scopes fall back to default_level.

billing.description: Trust level assigned to an agent. Forms a total order from untrusted to sovereign.

governance.description: Trust level assigned to an agent. Forms a total order from untrusted to sovereign.

inference.description: Trust level assigned to an agent. Forms a total order from untrusted to sovereign.

delegation.description: Trust level assigned to an agent. Forms a total order from untrusted to sovereign.

audit.description: Trust level assigned to an agent. Forms a total order from untrusted to sovereign.

composition.description: Trust level assigned to an agent. Forms a total order from untrusted to sovereign.

default_level.description: Trust level assigned to an agent. Forms a total order from untrusted to sovereign.

match_strategy.description: How a SignerCompetenceRule.required_capability_scopes set is compared against this profile's scopes. Default behavior on absence is "subset" (the trust profile must include every required scope) — preserves v8.4.0 implicit semantics.

precedence_score.description: Tiebreaker when multiple SignerCompetenceRules match the same action. Higher score wins. Absence means "no preference" — consumers fall back to rule-list order.

signer_status.description: Lifecycle state of a SignerEntry within a Keyring. Orthogonal to AgentLifecycleState.

anyOf.description: Signer is current and may produce signatures.
Signer is permanently invalidated (key compromise, intentional rotation, or sanction).
Signer has aged out per the keyring policy. Past signatures remain verifiable; new ones are not accepted.

created_at.description: When the keyring was first published.

updated_at.description: When the keyring last had a SignerEntry added, removed, or status-changed.

contract_version.description: Hounfour contract version this keyring instance was authored against.
